falsification: If organ constraint coupling is statistically absent in ICU time-series after controlling for shared haemodynamic drivers, the transfer model adds no value.
title: Adaptive Flux Limitation in Clinical Translation
validation_targets: Longitudinal ICU time-series: lactate, vasopressor dose, creatinine, urine output
Post-ICU sequelae cohorts: PICS, persistent Psi elevation as M_s proxy
Cardiorenal registry data: eGFR decline vs cardiac output drop correlation
